comingSoonPage.title: Coming soon
comingSoonPage.subtitle: We are working on this experience. Please check back later.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetLinkSent: Reset link sent! Check your inbox.
auth.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! You can now log in.
auth.emailVerifiedSubtitle: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
auth.verificationFailedSubtitle: This link may have expired or already been used.
auth.verificationResent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
auth.registrationSuccessSubtitle: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Please verify your email to continue.
auth.socialLoginError: Social login failed. Please try again.
auth.verifyEmailRequestSubtitle: We'll send a verification link to the address below.

home.chooseOption: Choose the option that best describes you
home.wantToSale: I want to sale my place
home.wantToRent: I want to rent a place
home.buyHomeDescription: Find your peace with no reservation costs, explore to your hearts all you like, including things you won't find anywhere else.
home.sellHomeDescription: No matter what path you take to sell your home, we can help you navigate a successful sale.
home.rentHomeDescription: We're creating a seamless online experience – from search listing and applying, to paying rent.

featuredProperty.title: Northfields House
featuredProperty.description: A beautiful Edwardian family home, barely 6 miles from the Sussex coast, with a grass tennis court and outdoor heated pool.

rentListingModal.titlePrefix: List your rental property for free -
rentListingModal.subtitle: Fill your vacancy on the network with over 1 million daily visitors. Post your rental today.
rentListingModal.sharedLivingSpace: This is a room for rent with shared living space
rentListingModal.noSuggestions: No matches found. Try a different search.
rentListingModal.searchFailed: Address search failed. Please try again.
rentListingModal.addressDetailsFailed: Could not load that address. Please try another.

dashboard.newInquiries: You have {count} new message inquiries and {homes} homes saved.
dashboard.deleteDraftDescription: This action will permanently remove this drafted property. You can not undo this.
dashboard.archiveListingDescription: This listing will be moved to archived listings. You can not undo this.

listing.addressSearchBusy: Wait for address search to finish

propertyInfo.title: Property information
propertyInfo.heading: Let's start creating your listing
propertyInfo.subtitle: Add or review details about your property's size.

rentDetails.title: Rent details
rentDetails.heading: How much are the monthly rent and the security deposit?
rentDetails.subtitle: Add or review details about your property's size.
rentDetails.rentNestimate: The current Rent estimate for this property is: {amount}
rentDetails.promoteOffer: Do you want to promote a special offer?
rentDetails.specialOfferDescription: Share details of the deal or discount you'd like to display to renters. This will appear on your listing until your chosen end date.
rentDetails.offerDescriptionPlaceholder: Example: Get $500 off your first month's rent when you sign by October 15.
rentDetails.offerWarning: Your offer won't post if it includes contact info – phone numbers, urls, or email addresses

media.title: Photos & media
media.addPhotosSubtitle: Photos help renters imagine living in your place.
media.tourSubtitle: Add a virtual tour link from a supported provider so renters can explore your space online.
media.tourModalLeadHeading: Provide the link to your tour
media.tourModalLeadSubtitle: Add a tour link from one of the supported sources below. Adding a tour is optional; if you add one, both the tour name and link are required.
media.tourNameHelper: Use a specific name (for example: "Large 1 bedroom").
media.tourBothFieldsRequired: Please enter both a tour name and a tour link, or leave both blank.
media.tourInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid tour link starting with http:// or https://.
media.lastPhotoCannotDelete: You can't remove the last photo from a live listing. Upload a new one before deleting this.

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.step1Heading: Showcase what's included in your time
amenities.step1Subtitle: Sharing more will help renters see themselves in your home.
amenities.step2Heading: Now tell us more about your property
amenities.step2Subtitle: Sharing more will help renters see themselves in your home.

screening.title: Screening criteria
screening.petPolicyHeading: Tell us about your pet policy
screening.petNotRequiredInfo: You aren't required to allow pets, but may still be asked to allow assistance animal
screening.financialHeading: What are your financial expectations for renters?
screening.financialSubtitle: We display these criteria on your listing and use them to help you review prospective renters, so you can quickly see who's a good fit for your property.

costs.title: Costs & fees
costs.heading: What additional costs and fees do you charge?
costs.subtitle: These details help renters know the real cost of renting your property, and helps you meet relevant fee transparency laws.
costs.showTotalMonthlyPrice: Show the total monthly price on your listing
costs.showTotalBullet1: Your base rent already includes all required monthly fees, or
costs.showTotalBullet2: You're adding all required monthly fees here — we'll add them to the base rent to show one total monthly price
costs.adminFeeSubtitle: Let renters know the fee type and amount, when it's charged, and whether it's included in the base rent. These details will appear on your listing.

finalDetails.title: Final details
finalDetails.leaseTermsHeading: What should renters know about the lease terms?
finalDetails.leaseTermsSubtitle: Help renters decide if your property's a good fit by including key lease details like duration, fees and utility costs, and other policies.
finalDetails.requireInsuranceQuestion: Do you require tenants to obtain renters insurance?
finalDetails.noRequireInsurance: No, I do not require renter insurance
finalDetails.listedByHeading: Who's listing this property for rent?
finalDetails.listedBySubtitle: Enter your information, unless you're creating the listing for someone else and they should be the main contact person.
finalDetails.phoneVerifySubtitle: For your security, Nesto will send a one time verification code to this number to verify that this listing belongs to you.
finalDetails.bookToursHeading: Do you want to use Nesto to book tours?
finalDetails.bookToursSubtitle: By adding availability to a tour calendar, renters can find a time that you're free and save you the back and forth. Select a booking method to use Nesto, or select nothing and press "Next" to manage tour requests on your own.
finalDetails.bookToursInstantlyDesc: Renters directly book a time from the availability provided on your listing.
finalDetails.descriptionSubtitle: Write several sentences describing the upgrade and desirable features that will attract renters to your property.
finalDetails.confirmSubtitle: To save your time, we added a few details about your home. You can edit, if needed.
finalDetails.allowPhoneContact: Allow renters to contact you by phone
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorMissingDraft: Please save previous listing steps before verifying your phone.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorInvalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number in international format (example: +998901234567).
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorInvalidPhoneForCountry: Enter a valid phone number for {country}.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorInvalidOtp: The code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorCodeExpired: This code has expired. Request a new one.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a bit and try again.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorCaptchaFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
finalDetails.phoneVerifyErrorUnexpected: Something went wrong while verifying your phone.

review.title: Review your listing
review.completeToPublish: Complete {count} key section to publish your listing.
review.readyToPublish: Your listing is ready to publish.
review.listingNotReady: Your listing is not ready to publish
review.issuesBlockingPublish: {count, plural, one {There is # issue to resolve before you can publish.} other {There are # issues to resolve before you can publish.}}
review.publishNotReadyGeneric: Finish any remaining requirements before publishing.

publish.title: Pay & publish
publish.earlyAccessDescription: We are currently offering all listing services for free to our early partners. No payment is required today.
publish.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

addressSearch.addressRequiredFields: Please fill street address, city, state/province, and postal code.
addressSearch.addressValidateError: Could not validate this address. Check your details and try again.
addressSearch.googleMapsKeyMissing: Map search is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY to use map pick.
addressSearch.mapReverseGeocodeFailed: Could not read an address from this map point. Try another spot or type the address.
addressSearch.mapPartialFillHint: Some address fields could not be filled from the map.
addressSearch.mapCompleteFieldsHint: Review the fields, fill anything missing, then press Search to validate.

form.title: For Sale By Owner Listing
form.subtitle: You as the seller take responsibility by agreeing to be fair to buyers and agents. Sellers take the highest closing agent above details, they may disagree before details and all communication is a binding agreement.
form.home3DDescription: You can add a 3D home to the property as well working directly by going to
form.photosDescription: Drag and drop photos here. Click on a photo to add caption or delete a photo.
form.duplicatePhoto: You already added "{name}" with the same file size.
form.photoPartialFailure: Failed to upload {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}}.
form.openHouseDescription: Open house may not currently allow for social distancing or comply with public health orders. Please consider alternatives such as Nesto 3D Home tours, or extending a time frame above.
form.whatYouLove: What I love about this home
form.whatYouLovePlaceholder: Tell us what you love about your home...
form.whatYouLoveHelper: We will not post trade Board information unless you choose it. Tell us what you love about your home.
form.contactDescription: Most buyers will contact you through the email address you have on Nesto. You must also provide a phone number so that we may reach you regarding your listing.
form.phoneVerifyHint: We will send an SMS to {dial} your number. Standard rates may apply.
form.phoneVerifyErrorInvalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country.
form.phoneVerifyErrorInvalidOtp: That code is not valid. Try again.
form.phoneVerifyErrorCodeExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one.
form.phoneVerifyErrorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Wait a bit and try again.
form.phoneVerifyErrorCaptchaFailed: Security check failed. Refresh and try again.
form.phoneVerifyErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
form.phoneVerifyErrorUnexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.submitMissingValidatedAddress: Please confirm your address on the map step before submitting.
form.submitPhoneNotVerified: Please verify your phone number before submitting.
form.submitPhoneMismatch: Contact phone must match the verified number.
form.submitMissingPhotos: Please upload at least one photo before submitting.
form.addressLockedHint: This address was confirmed on the map step and cannot be changed here.
form.termsText: I agree to acknowledge and understand the following: I can have authority to act on behalf of the owner of this home. I will not provide incorrect information or omit a discriminating preference. I will comply with the Nesto Terms of Use and our Listing Quality Policy.
form.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.editLoadError: Could not load this listing. Please try again.
form.photoLastCannotDelete: You must keep at least one photo on the listing.
